name: memory-retrieval
description: Retrieve matching past lessons based on keywords/topics from learnings.md and archive.

keyword.description: Keyword or topic phrase to search for in learnings (case-insensitive)

process.description: Identify failure keyword or topic needing context from history.
Execute memory_retriever tool with the keyword.
Read match results from stdout or python return value.
Review lessons learned and adapt the pipeline strategy.
